title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 441.070 - No notice necessary, when
text:
441.070.  No notice necessary, when. — No notice to quit shall be necessary from or to a tenant whose term is to end at a certain time, or when, by special agreement, notice is dispensed with.
(RSMo 1939 § 2972) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2585; 1919 § 6881; 1909 § 7884
